title: Sofa Cobblemon
description: A modpack centered around Cobblemon and its various addons, with additional mods for furniture, cooking, and building!
body: The Cobblemon-based modpack created for the official Sofa private Discord server. Additions like Cobblemon Unchained and Cobbreeding allow for additional methods of hunting for shiny Pokemon and perfect IVs, while Legendary Monuments and Cobblemon: Mega Showdown take team-building and hunting for legendaries to new heights! Other additions include extra furniture mods such as CobbleFurnies and the many [Let's Do] mods, as well as Chipped for all your building needs.
